---
name: Missing topic
about: A Hattrick topic is missing or only sketched
title: "[Missing] "
labels: missing-topic
---

## What's missing

The topic the skill doesn't cover (or covers only superficially).

## Why it matters

What kind of question would an AI assistant fail to answer well without this content? A concrete example helps.

## What you'd include

- Key mechanics, formulas, numbers
- Edge cases worth noting
- Suggested file/section location (existing file or a new reference file)

## Sources you'd use

Where the facts come from (rulebook section, devblog post, forum thread, community study, wiki page).

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
